share_integrations_error_description: The current status of the integrations could not be obtained.
share_qr_downloaded_description: The QR code has been downloaded successfully
share_link_copied_description: The link has been copied to the clipboard.
share_step2_description: Generate QR codes and links for your customers to access Linda
share_web_active_title: Linda is active on your website
share_web_inactive_title: Copy the script and paste it before the closing </body> tag on your website
share_web_tooltip_title: How to integrate Linda into your website?
share_web_tooltip_step1: Copy the script by clicking the button.
share_web_tooltip_step2: Open the HTML code of your website
share_web_tooltip_step3: Paste the script just before the closing tag
share_web_tooltip_step4: Save the changes and publish your site
share_web_tooltip_step5: Linda will appear as a floating widget!
share_channel_active_title: Linda is active on this channel
share_channel_inactive_title: Connect your account to activate Linda
linda_quick_starts_empty_description: Create your first button to quickly start conversations.
linda_quick_starts_delete_description: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to remove this quick launch button?
linda_quick_starts_button_text_placehold: For example: What services do they offer?
linda_quick_starts_button_text_descripti: This will be the text that appears on the button and the initial message of the conversation.
